commands_run.summary: Initial run surfaced an over-broad false-positive test case; 15 tests passed and 1 PL084 guardrail assertion failed before the test input was narrowed.
Targeted gate-rule suite passed after refining the non-workflow false-positive case; final result was 16 passed, 1 warning.

human_review_needed: Confirm the weak workflow fixture reflects the kinds of partial agent prompts the pilot most wants PL084 to catch.
next_recommended_step: Run the broader test suite or additional fixture-driven lint coverage if the pilot wants more confidence around PL084 edge cases.
risks_or_concerns: PL084 is still heuristic-driven, so prompts that mention multiple workflow terms outside a true worker contract may need more fixture coverage over time.
summary: Added focused PL084 tests and two workflow prompt fixtures so the gate suite now proves weak workflow prompts with placeholders and missing contract elements are flagged, while a clean workflow prompt and obvious non-workflow text stay clean.
